724 GG0170A2_ROLL_GOAL_CD GG0170A2_ROLL_GOAL_CD GG0170A2 Roll Goal Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to roll from lying on back to left and right side, and return to lying on back on the bed by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay.
